parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "action": "task.create",
  "idempotency_key": "endorse:task:{{ $json.ticket_id }}",
  "agency_workspace_id": "{{ $json.agency_workspace_id }}",
  "params": {
    "entity_type": "service_ticket",
    "entity_id": "{{ $json.ticket_id }}",
    "title": "Process Endorsement: {{ $json.endorsement_type }}",
    "description": "Endorsement requires manual review and approval. Type: {{ $json.processing_type }}",
    "priority": "{{ $json.priority }}",
    "category": "endorsement",
    "due_in_minutes": 240
  }
}
